descriptionTemplate:
Get ready for {raceCountLabel} with {marbleCount} marbles competing for victory! Every race is full of speed, chaos, close finishes, and unpredictable moments as the marbles battle their way through the track. Watch to see which marble comes out on top and whether your favorite can win it all.
Comment below with your favorite marble, your predictions, or ideas for future race challenges. Your suggestions help make every video more fun and exciting.
Like, subscribe, and stay tuned for more Marble Rush races!
survivorDescriptionTemplate:
Who will survive the Marble Race Survivor League? {marbleCount} marbles race through chaotic obstacle tracks, but only the strongest stay in the league.

Every race brings speed, crashes, moving gates, close finishes, and eliminations. Top racers survive, weaker marbles are replaced, and the league keeps getting tougher until one marble stands above the rest.

Comment your favorite marble and predict the next survivor!
